mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS O JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON O.ORDER_ID = OD.ORDER_ID JOIN PRODUCT P ON OD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN DELIVERY D ON O.ORDER_ID = D.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN STATUS S ON D.DELIVERY_ID = S.DELIVERY_ID LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
AND O.ORDER_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 0.99999

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY O.ORDER_ID DESC) AS ROW_NUM, O.ORDER_ID, TO_CHAR(O.ORDER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ORDER_DATE_STR, O.ORDERER_NAME, O.ORDERER_PHONE, O.ORDERER_EMAIL, O.RECV_NAME, O.RECV_PHONE, O.RECV_ADDRESS, O.RECV_ADDRESS AS ORDERER_ADDRESS, O.ORDER_CANCEL_YN,
P.PRODUCT_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1,
NVL(C.COMPANY_NAME, '-') AS COMPANY_NAME, NVL(C.COMPANY_PHONE, '-') AS COMPANY_PHONE, NVL(C.ADDRESS_ADDRESS, '-') AS COMPANY_ADDRESS,
TO_CHAR(D.EXPECTED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXPECTED_DATE_STR, NVL(S.DELIVERY_YN, 'N') AS DELIVERY_YN, NVL(S.DELIVERY_STATUS, '배송 준비') AS DELIVERY_STATUS, NVL(S.DNUM, '-') AS DNUM,
NVL(C.ADDRESS_ADDRESS, '000시 000구 000읍') AS START_ADDRESS, O.RECV_ADDRESS AS ARRIVE_ADDRESS
FROM ORDERS O JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON O.ORDER_ID = OD.ORDER_ID JOIN PRODUCT P ON OD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN DELIVERY D ON O.ORDER_ID = D.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN STATUS S ON D.DELIVERY_ID = S.DELIVERY_ID LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
AND O.ORDER_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 0.99999
) ORDER BY ORDER_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE STATUS SET DELIVERY_YN = #{deliveryYn}, DELIVERY_STATUS = CASE WHEN #{deliveryYn} = 'Y' THEN '배송완료' ELSE '배송중' END WHERE DELIVERY_ID = ( SELECT DELIVERY_ID FROM DELIVERY WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} )
